name: 自动化测试报告
description: 运行测试并生成报告通知

config.script: const pass = (body.match(/(\d+) passed/) || [])[1] || '0'; const fail = (body.match(/(\d+) failed/) || [])[1] || '0'; return {pass, fail, total: parseInt(pass)+parseInt(fail)}

config.title: 测试报告
config.text: 通过: {{parse.pass}}, 失败: {{parse.fail}}, 总计: {{parse.total}}
